info.name: Content + Expense Category + Expense Management
info.description:
Postman collection for **`/api/content-management`**, **`/api/expense-category-management`**, **`/api/expense-management`**, plus **`/api/state`**, **`/api/city`**, **`/api/area`** (see `server.js`).

**Setup:** Set **`{{baseUrl}}`** (e.g. `http://localhost:5001` or `https://…execute-api…/staging`). Run **Login** to set **`{{token}}`**. Set **`{{franchiseId}}`** to a real franchise ObjectId before expense category / expense calls.

**State / City / Area:** Run **State → Create** first (sets **`stateId`** and **`stateNameForImport`**), then **City → Create** (**`cityId`**), then **Area → Create** (**`areaId`**). Duplicate **name** on create/update returns **409** (trim + case-insensitive for state/city; area name unique **per city**).

**Dashboard counts:** **`POST /api/getCount`** with body `type` = **`content-management`**, **`expenses`**, or **`settings-expense-categories`** (see `count_controller.js` → `resolveCountType`).

**Variables:** Expense category **Create** saves **`{{expenseCategoryId}}`** (parent category document) and **`{{expenseSubcategoryId}}`** for **`POST /api/expense-management/create`** — these names avoid clashing with catalogue **`categoryId`** used elsewhere.

**06 — Franchise management:** **`/api/franchise`** (CRUD, imports, related-catalog, dropdown). **07 — User management:** **`/api/user`** with subfolders **User** and **Partner** (includes public **`POST /register-partner`**).

request.description: Franchise admin (`type` 1): scoped to caller franchise. Response includes **`total_expense`**.

query.description: Optional; server also accepts `sort` as alias.

request.description: Saves **`expenseCategoryId`** (parent) and **`expenseSubcategoryId`** for expense create — does not overwrite catalogue **`categoryId`**.

query.description: Alias of sort_by when sort_by empty.

request.description: **`category_id`** = expense category document id (`expenseCategoryId`). **`subcategory_id`** = expense subcategory id (`expenseSubcategoryId`).

item.name: 05 — State, City & Area
item.description: Routes from `state_routes.js`, `city_routes.js`, `area_routes.js`. All routes use rate limiting. **`getDropDown`** for each resource has **no** `authMiddleware` in code; other calls need **`Bearer {{token}}`**.

request.description: Response includes **`savedState`**. Resend the same **`name`** to verify **409** `State name already exists.`
**`state_name`** must match an existing state in DB. Run **State → Create** first so **`stateNameForImport`** is set, or edit manually.
**`city_id`** = Mongo ObjectId (24 hex). Sets **`areaId`** on success.

item.name: 06 — Franchise management
item.description: Routes from `franchise_routes.js` → **`/api/franchise`**. All routes use **`rateLimiter`**. Use **`{{stateId}}`**, **`{{cityId}}`**, **`{{areaId}}`** from section 05 where needed. **`{{adminId}}`** = any existing user `_id` (saved as franchise `admin_id`). **Create** overwrites collection variable **`franchiseId`** on success.

request.description: Requires valid **`admin_id`** (user must exist). **`categories`** / **`services`** are optional ObjectId arrays (validated if non-empty). Duplicate name per city returns **409**.
Send only fields to change. See `updateFranchiseMiddleware` for validation rules.

query.description: true / 1 to list all active franchises.
Optional; excludes franchises already assigned to other admins.

item.name: 07 — User management
item.description: Routes from **`user_routes.js`** → **`/api/user`**. Split into **User** (staff/backoffice CRUD, verification list) and **Partner** (public mobile register + partner-scoped listing/dropdown). See `authorizeUserCreate` for who may call **Create**.

request.description: **`POST /api/user/create`** — Bearer required. Route uses **`uploadImages.single("image")`**; JSON works when no file is sent (Express JSON body). For profile upload use **form-data** with field **`image`** (file) plus text fields. Super admin (5) / staff (6): any type. Franchise admin (1) / employee (3): only partner (2), employee (3), user (4); **`franchise_id`** forced for partner/employee when omitted.

query.description: 1 admin, 2 partner, 3 employee, 4 user — access depends on caller.
Super admin / staff only; franchise admin cannot pass this.

request.description: Uses **`uploadImages.single("image")`** — same note as Create for multipart.

**No JWT.** Only **`type`: 2** and **`is_from_web`: false** (`publicPartnerRegisterMiddleware`). Web/admin-created partners must use **User → Create user** with auth. Optional **`image`** file field; enable and attach a file to satisfy profile rules without `profile_url`.
Same route as **Get all users** with **`type=2`**.

variable.description: Set by State → Create for City → Import cities.
User _id used as franchise admin_id on create/import (must exist).
Set by User → Create user on success.
Set by Partner → Register partner on success.
Optional; Mongo _id of creator for web onboarding flows.
